signals.headline: Ripple's XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap Confirmed Bullish for XRP | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple's XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap Confirmed Bullish for XRP | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger (XRPL) quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid signatures starting H2 2026, positioning XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum.[1][5] This proactive step against quantum threats boosts long-term adoption prospects amid
